import pygame
import sys
import random
import time

# Inicialização de Pygame
pygame.init()

# Configurações da janela
WIDTH, HEIGHT = 600, 600
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((WIDTH, HEIGHT))
pygame.display.set_caption("Snake Game")

clock = pygame.time.Clock()

# Direções da serpente
direction = 'RIGHT'

# Serpente (coordenadas)
snake = [(100, 50), (100, 70), (100, 90)]

# Comida (posição aleatória)
food = (random.randint(0, WIDTH - 10), random.randint(0, HEIGHT - 10))

# Loop principal
while True:
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            pygame.quit()
            sys.exit()
        if event.type == pygame.KEYDOWN:
            if event.key == pygame.K_LEFT and direction != 'RIGHT':
                direction = 'LEFT'
            elif event.key == pygame.K_RIGHT and direction != 'LEFT':
                direction = 'RIGHT'
            elif event.key == pygame.K_UP and direction != 'DOWN':
                direction = 'UP'
            elif event.key == pygame.K_DOWN and direction != 'UP':
                direction = 'DOWN'

    # Movimento da serpente
    head_x, head_y = snake[0]
    if direction == 'RIGHT':
        new_head = (head_x + 10, head_y)
    elif direction == 'LEFT':
        new_head = (head_x - 10, head_y)
    elif direction == 'UP':
        new_head = (head_x, head_y - 10)
    elif direction == 'DOWN':
        new_head = (head_x, head_y + 10)

    # Verifica colisão com a parede
    if new_head[0] < 0 or new_head[0] >= WIDTH or new_head[1] < 0 or new_head[1] >= HEIGHT:
        pygame.quit()
        sys.exit()

    # Verifica colisão com a própria serpente
    if new_head in snake[1:]:
        pygame.quit()
        sys.exit()

    # Atualiza a serpente
    snake.insert(0, new_head)
    if new_head == food:
        food = (random.randint(0, WIDTH - 10), random.randint(0, HEIGHT - 10))
    else:
        snake.pop()

    # Desenho
    screen.fill((0, 0, 0))
    for pos in snake:
        pygame.draw.rect(screen, (255, 0, 0), (pos[0], pos[1], 10, 10))
    pygame.draw.rect(screen, (0, 255, 0), (food[0], food[1], 10, 10))

    pygame.display.flip()
    clock.tick(10)
def fibonacci(n): return n if n <= 1 else fibonacci(n-1) + fibonacci(n-2)
